aboutData.title: Hi There! I'm Subhan Ahmed
aboutData.subtitle: E-commerce Specialist
aboutData.text: I am an E-commerce Specialist With 2 years of experience in the field, I have managed product listings, inventory, and order fulfillment while executing digital marketing campaigns to boost sales. Skilled in working with affiliates, handling customer feedback, and creating content that drives engagement and conversions.

services.title: TikTok Shop Management
services.text: Expert-level TikTok Shop management including campaign execution, flash sales, influencer coordination, and content strategy to maximize traffic, conversions, and revenue.

services.title: Digital Marketing
services.text: End-to-end digital marketing including paid ads, Social Media Posts, email campaigns, and social media strategy to grow brand visibility, generate leads, and drive measurable results.

services.title: Affiliate Marketing Management
services.text: Managed full affiliate programs — onboarding creators, sending samples, tracking performance, and optimizing commissions to consistently boost sales and maximize ROI.

services.title: Amazon Store Management
services.text: Full Amazon account management covering product listing optimization, keyword research, PPC campaigns, A+ content, review management, and FBA logistics to grow your brand on Amazon.

services.title: Shopify Store Development & Management
services.text: Designed and managed professional Shopify stores with optimized product pages, payment setup, apps integration, theme customization, and conversion-focused UX to drive sales.

services.title: AI Agents & Automation
services.text: Built and deployed AI agents to automate repetitive business tasks, customer interactions, lead generation, and workflows saving time and scaling operations efficiently.

skillData.title: My Professional Skillset
skillData.text: I have developed a strong skill set in TikTok Shop management, from performance marketing to e-commerce operations. Here are some of the key areas where I excel, with a proven track record of driving growth and engagement.

details.content:
Description 1 — Seller Center
The Seller Center is performing strongly across all key metrics over the last 28 days, with GMV surpassing $1.3M (+25.75%) and visitors growing by over 42%, indicating healthy traffic conversion. The shop maintains a near-perfect 4.8/5.0 performance score. However, 999+ pending shipments signal a logistics bottleneck that requires immediate attention to maintain customer satisfaction and avoid order delays.

Description 2 — Affiliate & Creator
The affiliate program is a dominant revenue driver, contributing 93.35% of total seller GMV over the last 28 days, with shoppable video content alone generating $1.2M. LIVE GMV surged +258.61%, reflecting strong creator engagement on livestream formats. On the 7-day view, while GMV and commissions are trending upward, short videos and creator showcase products declined ~9.5%, suggesting creators may be shifting focus away from product showcasing — a trend worth monitoring and addressing through targeted outreach or incentives.
UK Seller Centre — Last 28 days (Updated Jan 16, 2025)

Description 1 — UK Seller Centre Homepage
The UK store is experiencing a significant decline across core sales metrics — GMV, buyers, and ordered SKUs all dropped over 37–44% compared to the previous 28-day period. While visitor traffic grew +34.45%, it is not converting into purchases, which points to potential issues with product pricing, listings, or stock availability. With 71 products out of stock out of 90 flagged as low stock, inventory shortages are likely the primary cause of lost sales. The shop health status of "Needs Improvement" — with 5 metrics below threshold including a 74% 24-hour response rate — adds urgency to address both operational responsiveness and stock replenishment.

Description 2 — UK Analytics Overview
The analytics data reinforces the homepage findings — all revenue metrics are in decline over the 28-day window, with Est. Net Revenue falling the hardest at -41.68%. The gap between Gross Revenue (£39,811) and Net Revenue (£27,333) represents approximately £12,478 in platform fees and deductions, which is worth reviewing for margin optimisation. Today's figures are sharply lower than yesterday's across all metrics (GMV down from £1,275 to £412, customers from 29 to 11), suggesting a volatile daily performance pattern likely tied to stock-out issues. The absence of any LIVE video activity and no active campaigns are missed opportunities to drive traffic and conversion at a time when the store needs a recovery push.
UK Seller Centre — Last 28 days (Updated Apr 6, 2026)

Description 1 — UK Seller Centre Homepage (28 Days)
The UK store has recovered meaningfully compared to the January 2025 data — GMV is growing again at +7.25% and all key metrics are trending positively. Visitor traffic has surged to over 100,000 (+34.10%), and customer and order counts are both up double digits, suggesting improved product availability and listing quality. The stock situation has also improved dramatically from 71 out-of-stock products in January down to just 5, though this should remain a close watch. The Shop Health status still reads "Needs Improvement," indicating there are ongoing compliance or performance issues that need resolving to protect the store's standing on the platform.
UK Seller Centre — Last 7 days (Updated Apr 6, 2026)
UK Ads Dashboard — GMV Max (Mar 7 – Apr 6, 2026)

Description 2 — Ads Dashboard & 7-Day Overview
The 7-day snapshot shows slow but steady growth — GMV up 3.77% and visitors up 10.59%, though customer growth is nearly flat at +0.24%, meaning traffic is not fully converting. On the ads side, GMV Max campaigns are generating strong gross revenue of £39,531 from £3,654 in spend, delivering an ROI of 10.82x — a healthy return. However, the ROI has declined -14.40% vs the previous period, driven by ad costs rising +22.16% while SKU orders stayed almost flat (-0.05%). This cost-per-order creep (now £1.82, up 22.15%) needs monitoring closely. The Commission Savings Programme (not yet started) could help offset rising ad costs and is worth activating given the store's current growth phase.

Description 1 — US Analytics (7-Day)
The US store posted explosive growth in the last 7 days of August 2025, with all key metrics up over 237–298% compared to the prior week. GMV reached $6,076 on just 471 orders, and items sold hit 514 — indicating strong average order values. The upward trend visible in the chart accelerates sharply from Aug 29 onwards, peaking around Aug 31, which suggests a campaign, viral content, or affiliate-driven sales spike. Platform recommendations to request reviews and reduce negative reviews (each estimated to increase sales by 3%) are low-effort actions that should be acted on immediately to sustain this momentum.
US Seller Center — Last 28 days (Updated Sep 1, 2025)

Description 2 — US Seller Center Homepage (7-Day & 28-Day)
Over the full 28-day period the US store generated $17,892 in GMV with 1,272 customers and over 102,000 visitors, all growing solidly at 17–40%. The 7-day view reveals the growth is heavily back-loaded — the final week alone contributed $6,076 (34% of the monthly GMV), indicating a strong late-August surge that should be investigated and replicated. The shop performance rating of 4.1/5.0 is lower than the 4.8 seen in January 2025, partly attributed to new scoring rules — worth reviewing the Account Health section to understand what's dragging the score down. With 399 orders pending shipment and 10 out-of-stock products, fulfillment capacity needs attention to avoid this growth spike causing delivery delays and negative reviews.

informations.title: Arslan
informations.text: I hired Subhan to help me set up my TikTok Shop, and I am extremely impressed with his work. From the very beginning, he was professional, knowledgeable, and incredibly easy to communicate with. He guided me through every step of the process, answered all my questions clearly, and made the entire setup smooth and stress-free

informations.title: Khairul
informations.text: Subahan is a very nice guy. We have been working for long time. His current project is finished. Looking forward to work with him in near future.

informations.title: Muhammad A.
informations.text: Subhan did an exceptional job! His expertise, attention to detail, and clear communication made the entire process seamless. He delivered outstanding results ahead of schedule, and I’d happily hire him again. Highly recommended

experience.title: TikTok Shop Executive

education.title: Bachelor of Business Administration

text: I studied the core concepts of business, including how organizations operate, management principles, and different business structures.
I learned marketing strategies, customer behavior, branding, and effective ways to promote and sell products and services.
I gained knowledge of financial management, budgeting, and accounting basics to understand how businesses handle money and make financial decisions.
I developed an understanding of human resource management, including hiring processes, employee development, and workplace management.
I improved my communication, teamwork, and problem-solving skills to work effectively in a professional business environment.
